reported_entities.name: Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF)
reported_entities.claim: Official website of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation, a Linux Foundation project hosting Kubernetes, Envoy, Prometheus and other cloud native projects.

notes: Single WebSearch query for 'CNCF Cloud Native Computing Foundation official website' returned cncf.io as the top result, corroborated by Wikipedia and GitHub org page referencing the same domain. High confidence, no further verification queries needed.
